texto: The deep self has been referred to by many names over the ages. You may know it as Essence, Spirit, Soul, Source...or, perhaps by no name at all. I prefer to call it The Inner Shaman...The Inner Shaman simply waits for your sanity, that glimmer of light or recognition on your part. In short, it is waiting for your readiness to be aware of it.
explicacao: Citação de José Luis Stevens sobre temas ligados a espiritualidade. “The deep self has been referred to by many names over the ages. You may know it as Essence, Spiri…” articula espiritualidade, core-self, self-help em registro de espiritualidade, com relevância para contextos como self-help e shamanism.
